calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2020 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing And Application For Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Richard Rose.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408-410-8090. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com.

Brian R. Blackman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Charter Asset Management Fund, L.P.
David Park, Managing Partner Charter Asset Management Fund, L.P., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Richard Rose.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Conversion, Breach of Fiduciary Duty and Breach of Contract was filed on June 28, 2018, and personally served on defendant Richard Rose on September 24, 2018.
Default as to defendant Richard Rose was entered on December 17, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on May 1, 2019.
Notice of Dismissal of defendant Richard Rose's Chapter 13 Bankruptcy proceeding was filed on October 25, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Charter Asset Management Fund, L.P. and against the defaulted defendant Richard Rose, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $64,693.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,221.48
Attorney Fees - $53,174.89.
Costs - $1,150.00.

Total - $134,239.52.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
